text_block_list.text: The day of the Satsuki Sho ——

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I must say, it's rare isn't it, for you to 
come watch somebody else's race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
…I felt that there was a reason why I 
had to come see today's Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oooh～! Then this must be some sort of revelation that has been granted upon you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Maybe there's something that will lead 
us towards even greater fortunes…! 
Isn't this exciting…!

text_block_list.name: Racing Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It's gotta be Mejiro Bright's win this year! 
Following last year's rhythm, I think she's 
got this one in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Racing Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Stay Gold is the smallest one here again～ 
Seems like it's gonna be a tough race 
for her…

text_block_list.name: Bubble Gum Fellow
text_block_list.text:
…I really want her to shock everyone 
today with that run of hers.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I agree, though even if she can't show it 
off, that's just how a race is sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All we can do now is watch over Stego's 
first act in the Classics, and hope that 
no misfortune befalls her.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …The realization is hitting me…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: That I'm actually running today…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: In this Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hahah… Been a while since I got chills like this…!

Seeing Stay Gold's electrifying anticipation 
towards today's Satsuki Sho made my 
heart skip a few beats.
choice_data_list: Show everyone what you're made of
Show everyone what you're made of

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Let's make a resounding first 
step forward through terra incognita.
——Someone is enthusiastic I see.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh～ It's you guys! Gee, you guys came all this way for me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If I were to use your words, this race is 
the departing flight for your journey 
ahead. Is it not fair for me to come 
see my fellow training partner off?

text_block_list.name: $(scale 55)Elegant Chestnut-Haired Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Miss Stego, all the best for your race…! 
I may have only been in your shadows, 
but I will be praying for your victory…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I'll be taking that prayer of 
yours with me onto the turf.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
…Bright and all the other racers are 
aiming for the perfect finish. This will 
not be an easy race for you.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well, it isn't one of the Classics for 
nothing. But of course, I'm ready 
for this.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Be sure to watch me guys, I'm going 
to put everything I got into this.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Alright. I guess it's about time I get going.
choice_data_list: May you have a good Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: May you also enjoy a great Satsuki Sho!
(Waaaaaaaaaaーーーーー!!)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…So this is the paddock of the 
Satsuki Sho…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
(…I can feel it whirling all around me, the 
crowd's anticipation, and their dreams…)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Just being able to bask in this 
feeling is great.
Miss Stego～

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I am incredibly glad we were able to meet 
at this Satsuki Sho with no trouble.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah… I'm filled with all sorts of emotions.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let us make this a match. 
I shall not be losing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
On my honor as a horsegirl of the Meijiro 
family, I shall not lose to you, Miss Stego, 
nor to anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I feel honored for you to view me that 
way, Bright… Let's have ourselves a 
good Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Most definitely. I shall see you 
afterwards ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
(…Bright's dedication is the real thing. 
But ——)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
(…There is a storm brewing on this 
racecourse, and it's not for Bright. 
In fact, I don't know who it looms 
for…)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Well, since they're not running here 
today, I'm probably fated to meet them 
sometime anyway ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ——Anything is fine, I'll gladly take it on.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
May this storm decide it all, 
in this Satsuki Sho…!
